title: Lastrea neglecta
taxonomy: Lastrea neglecta is classified as a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns that are native to Asia. The species is also known as the neglected lady fern due to its similarity to other lady ferns. Lastrea neglecta is native to China and is often found growing in woodland areas. The classification of Lastrea neglecta reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the fern family.
